title: Ancient Arsenal
description: Provides new armor sets and tool sets corresponding to different
body: # 🛡️ Ancient Arsenal **Ancient Arsenal** expands Minecraft’s endgame with powerful new materials, armor sets, and unique upgrade paths. Dive into the Deep Dark, scour desert ruins, or brave ocean depths to forge gear with special effects and powerful tools tailored to each biome and theme. Visit the [wiki](https://github.com/nishiharaes/Ancient-Arsenal/wiki) to learn more! --- ## 🔨 Features - **7 New Armor Sets** – Each with unique attributes and full-set bonuses - **New Tool Materials** – Some sets come with specially themed tools - **Upgrade Templates** – Vanilla-style smithing templates for balance and progression - **Biome & Lore Integration** – Materials are themed around specific environments or mobs - **Set Effects** – Equip full sets to gain unique effects like Dolphin’s Grace or extra hearts --- ## 🧱 Example Materials - **Tenebrine** – A tier above Netherite, found in the Deep Dark - **Pigsteel** – Piglin-forged armor with gold appeal and axe focus - **Nautilite** – Aquatic gear granting underwater benefits - **Hexwood, Sandspire, Blazebound, Chorus Alloy** – Each with lore-rich origins and tailored bonuses --- ![Armor Sets](https://nishi.s-ul.eu/08mozaiS) ![Tool sets](https://nishi.s-ul.eu/y5g4jaq7)
